query:
SELECT u.name, dsl.digestType, dsl.weekKey, dsl.status, dsl.sentAt, dsl.itemCount, dsl.errorMessage
FROM digestScheduleLog dsl
JOIN users u ON u.id = dsl.userId
WHERE dsl.digestType = 'thursday'
  AND dsl.weekKey >= '2026-W19'
ORDER BY dsl.weekKey DESC, u.name;
